news.t: These Are the Emerging-Market ETFs That the Pros Are Recommending

holdings.infoBox: EPU is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Credicorp stock at 24.74%, Southern Copper at 22.88%, Hochschild Mining at 4.22%, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura at 4.07%, and VOLCAN COMPANIA MINERA B PREF at 3.28%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Peru and Global Exposure ETF (EPU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Peru Capped index. The fund is passively managed to track market cap -weighted index that seeks to provide broad Peru equity exposure. Selection includes a minimum number of Peruvian securities and issuers before expanding exposure to those stocks with related exposure. EPU was launched on Jun 19, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: These Are the Emerging-Market ETFs That the Pros Are Recommending
data.text: Funds with ties to the AI boom in emerging markets like South Korea, Taiwan and Peru could make a run-up to rival the Magnificent Seven
